resources.string: GoToShelter
Automate Navigation to Shelters
GoToShelter monitors emergency early warnings in real time. When a warning is detected, it automatically launches Waze or Google Maps to navigate you to the nearest shelter.
Tzofar Alerts
To receive alerts from Tzofar, grant location and notifications permissions. Location will only be used when an alert is received to check if it applies to your location.
To receive alerts from Tzofar, grant notifications permission.
To receive alerts from Tzofar, grant location permission. Location will only be used when an alert is received to check if it applies to your location.
To receive alerts from Tzofar reliably, choose "Allow all the time" in settings. Location will only be used when an alert is received to check if it applies to your location.
Home Front Command Alerts
To receive alerts from Home Front Command, grant notification access.
Driving Detection
To start Waze only when driving, grant physical activity permission. It will only be used when an alert is received for your location.
Display Over Other Apps
This permission is required for automatic navigation launch. It allows the app to start Waze immediately when an alert is received.
Test Waze Launch
Grant
Waze or Google Maps has to be installed in order to use this app
This app does not store or transmit any data. It is open source and available on GitHub.
Exit App
Granted

GoToShelter is an independent tool and does NOT represent or have any affiliation with any government entity. This app provides supplementary alerts by monitoring official notification channels, such as the Israel Home Front Command (https://www.oref.org.il/). Always follow official instructions from government authorities during emergencies.
Battery Optimization
Disabling battery optimization is required in order to ensure that the app receives alerts reliably in the background
At least one alert service (Home Front Command or Tzofar) has to be enabled in order to use this app
App is Not Active
